title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ET Money Ventures Solutions:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money Ventures Solutions!
